title: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon
wikitext:
[]: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by BoogerPoo2002 » Mon May 02, 2022 12:50 pm Who here thinks that Amazon should have gone with Funimation for the dub of Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 and all other Rebuild films on their streaming service? I for one think that they should've, cuz the English voice acting for 3.0 + 1.0 is abysmal in my opionion. I also think that Amazon should use the Funimation dubs for the other Rebuild films, and make a new Funimation dub for 3.0 + 1.0. Anybody here think so, too?

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by AWinters » Sun Aug 28, 2022 9:41 pm Licensing is complicated, I don't think this would have been possible. I preferred the Funimation dub too, especially the dialogue differences. I felt a bit sad that a lot of my favourite lines were replaced by lines that felt generic. In Funimation I wasn't crazy about Kensuke's high voice or Kaji's deep voice, but overall I agree the acting was better. I'd recommend watching the first two by Funimation then the last 2 by Amazon. The IU 15 year gap makes it seem like their voices have aged in that time and Rei has a slighly different voice because she's not the same Rei. It works remarkably well.

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by mastafishere » Mon Sep 19, 2022 4:07 pm This might be complete lunacy, but I'm hoping some fan decides to mix in Amanda Wynn-Lee's line readings into the Funimation dub. That would become my preferred version.

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by AWinters » Mon Sep 19, 2022 5:20 pm mastafishere wrote: This might be complete lunacy, but I'm hoping some fan decides to mix in Amanda Wynn-Lee's line readings into the Funimation dub. That would become my preferred version.

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by CoolJosh2002 » Tue Sep 20, 2022 1:05 am AWinters wrote: There's something in the works, which I still need to sample myself. post/937215/Evangelion-The-Definitive-Dub-Project/#937215

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by mastafishere » Tue Sep 27, 2022 8:55 pm CoolJosh2002 wrote: I'm working on it! Rebuild will be a while off yet, but 1.11, 2.22 and 3.33 will use a mixture of both Funimation and Amazon for what I deem to be the best overall experience in English, while also trying to maintain some sort of consistency between the Series and the Rebuilds.

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by CoolJosh2002 » Thu Sep 29, 2022 2:02 am mastafishere wrote: That is really cool! I'm fully on board with this! Do you have a patreon or something so I can support your project?

[]: Re: Funimation Dubs for Rebuild Amazon?             Quote Post by WDS » Fri Sep 30, 2022 2:49 pm mastafishere wrote: This might be complete lunacy, but I'm hoping some fan decides to mix in Amanda Wynn-Lee's line readings into the Funimation dub. That would become my preferred version.
